comment_text.sn35.113:1.1: This is the same as SN 12.45; see there for notes.

root_text.sn35.113:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā nātike viharati giñjakāvasathe.
root_text.sn35.113:1.2: Atha kho bhagavā rahogato paṭisallīno imaṁ dhammapariyāyaṁ abhāsi:
root_text.sn35.113:1.3: “cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.113:1.12: manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.113:2.1: Cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.113:2.10: manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.113:3.1: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu bhagavato upassuti ṭhito hoti.
root_text.sn35.113:3.2: Addasā kho bhagavā taṁ bhikkhuṁ upassuti ṭhitaṁ.

translation_text.sn35.113:1.1: At one time the Buddha was staying at Ñātika in the brick house.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.2: Then while the Buddha was in private retreat he spoke this exposition of the teaching:
translation_text.sn35.113:1.3: “Eye consciousness arises dependent on the eye and sights. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.4: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.5: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.6: Craving is a requirement for grasping.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.7: Grasping is a requirement for continued existence.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.8: Continued existence is a requirement for rebirth.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.9: Rebirth is a requirement for old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress to come to be.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.10: That is how this entire mass of suffering originates.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.12: Mind consciousness arises dependent on the mind and ideas. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.13: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.14: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.15: Craving is a requirement for grasping.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.16: Grasping is a requirement for continued existence.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.17: Continued existence is a requirement for rebirth.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.18: Rebirth is a requirement for old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress to come to be.
translation_text.sn35.113:1.19: That is how this entire mass of suffering originates.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.1: Eye consciousness arises dependent on the eye and sights. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.2: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.3: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.4: When that craving fades away and ceases with nothing left over, grasping ceases.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.5: When grasping ceases, continued existence ceases.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.6: When continued existence ceases, rebirth ceases.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.7: When rebirth ceases, old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress cease.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.8: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.10: Mind consciousness arises dependent on the mind and ideas. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.11: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.12: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.13: When that craving fades away and ceases with nothing left over, grasping ceases.
translation_text.sn35.113:2.15: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.”
translation_text.sn35.113:3.1: Now at that time a certain monk was standing listening in on the Buddha.
translation_text.sn35.113:3.4: “Monk, did you hear that exposition of the teaching?”
translation_text.sn35.113:3.9: That exposition of the teaching is beneficial and relevant to the fundamentals of the spiritual life.”
